title: Batoon's Modpacks: Optimization
description: 26.1.2 - 1.21.11 Maximum FPS Modpack. If you want to play the most modern version of Minecraft, use this.
body:
Do you want to enjoy the Newest Minecraft Updates with the best Fps? 
This is the Modpack for you!.
With Java adding more and more featues with every updates, the game gets pregressivly laggier and laggier. But this modpacks comes to save your FPS!
